text: GitHub is "experiencing an issue that impacts approximately 10% of traffic". Except... my gh auth works 0% of the time. Ah. The art of status page updates.
@YashasGunderia @bcherny i think you need to toggle "allow auto permissions mode" in settings...
@alexellisuk @bcherny i think you need to allow auto permissions mode in settings...

Every time I get a 500 error from Claude, but the status page is all green, I think back to all the Iron.io days when users would email us the second their workers were queuing but we hadn't updated our status page.
I guess I'm getting somewhere..... pic.x.com/aNF5kCF8RZ
